The following general conditions will govern this Rental Agreement between the LESSOR and LESSEE:
1
Determination of Rental Charges The monthly rental payment for the use of the equipment covered by this lease shall be that
amount stated in the Rental Agreement and shall not be subject to any deduction on account of any non-working days in the month or for any
periods of time in which the equipment may be non-operable. The rental rates contained in this agreement are based on an operating day of
regular single shifts not to exceed forty five (45) hours per week and not to exceed one hundred-eighty (180) hours per month. If the equipment
is worked more than the above stated hours, additional rental will be due to the LESSOR based on an hourly rate. N/A
2
Loading, Unloading, and Transportation The equipment covered by this lease may be picked up at the LESSOR's facility by
LESSEE and if so, the LESSOR will assist LESSEE in loading equipment. If LESSEE desires LESSOR to deliver the equipment to the desired
destination, the transportation charge shall be $ 750.00
which is to be paid in advance with the first advance rental
payment. At the termination of the rental period, LESSEE is to return the equipment to LESSOR's facility at Goose Creek, SC
at his
own expense or may request LESSOR to pick up the equipment andreturn to the above named facility. If the LESSEE desires LESSOR to
transport the equipment back to the above named facility, the charge will be $ 750.00
for this transportation.
